message:
Update beads issue tracker state for completed milestones

Update issue tracking records reflecting completed work across multiple
feature tracks:

- Close/update issues related to dependency preflight gating, topology
  validation, convergence orchestration, process triage contracts, and
  fault injection reliability scenarios.
- Record completion status, close reasons, and implementation notes for
  issues in the bd-vvmd milestone series covering foundation, preflight,
  selection, and reliability work streams.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
